title: Amulet
description: Stylised PR that gives the game a stylized feel. POM/PBR
body:
Gallery

Website : https://zaura.net/

What is it?

Amulet is a stylized POM/PBR resourcepack made for Minecraft.

Features :

  • Uses Optifine for variations, and reduces the tiled look across minecraft.
  • Normal maps which provides bumps and height to the RP, making it feel real.
  • Specular maps that add reflections, and other features which enhance the pack.
  • Blocks are still identifiable even tho it is stylistic.

 

Installation :

  1. Make sure to download optifine;
  2. Download a compatible shader to use (Kappa/PT, Nostalgia/VX; Others : MollyVX, ApolloRT, Complementary/BSL/Astralex, DrDestens);
  3. Download the pack directly from curseforge, and drag it into your resourcepack folder;
  4. Select the resourcepack "Amulet 32x" and the shaderpack;
  5. Follow the shader settings at the bottom for best looks.

  

Other Info :
I have used Substance Designer for procedurally generating the textures, and then some Photoshop for some fine tweaks. Then all the nodes are merged using Pixelgraph for merging them onto a Normal Map and Specular Map. This version of Amulet will always remain free and will be getting updates. You can support me here for a higher resolution version and faster updates. You are not allowed to redistribute Amulet for any cause without permission.

This pack is supported by Bisect Hosting. Use code 'zaura' for 25% off the first month.

Shader pack settings (Kappa/PT, Nostalgia/VX; Others : MollyVX, ApolloRT, Complementary/BSL/Astralex, DrDestens) :

  • Normalmap : ON
  • Resourcepack Reflections : ON
    • POM : ON
           -Samples : 128
    • Similar for other shaders aswell, but set the texture mode to LabPBR
